title: CarryMe
description: Put your friends on your shoulders!
body:
🤝 CarryMe

Modern, lightweight and fun player carrying system

Version: 1.0.2 | Compatibility: 1.19 up to 26.1+ (and forks)

🎮 Support Discord

--- Looking for a simple and fun way for players to interact beyond the usual gameplay? **CarryMe** adds a lightweight carrying system that lets players pick up other players and travel together in a more immersive way. It is perfect for roleplay, survival, social servers, and hubs. Carry your AFK friend, create funny moments with other players, and enjoy a clean request-based system that feels intuitive and easy to use. --- ## ✨ Main Features ### 🤝 Interactive Request System Send a carry request to another player with a simple command: * The target receives a clickable chat message. * Includes **[Accept]** and **[Deny]** buttons for a fast response. * Keeps interactions clean, simple, and user-friendly. --- ## 💻 Commands and Permissions **Main Command:** * `/carryme` **Commands:** * `/carry ` - Sends a carry request to another player (`carryme.cargar`) * `/drop` - Drops the player you are currently carrying (`carryme.soltar`) * `/accept` - Accepts a pending carry request (`carryme.accept`) * `/reject` - Denies a pending carry request (`carryme.rechazar`) * `/carryme reload` - Reloads the plugin configuration (`carryme.reload`) --- ## 🛠️ Example Usage Flow Using CarryMe is quick and simple: 1. Run `/carry ` 2. Wait for the target player to accept 3. Carry the player on your shoulders 4. Use `/drop` to release them when needed 5. The carried player can also dismount by pressing **Shift** --- ## 🖼️ Preview ![Carry player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74b48dd789235ccfb333c94fab5cba0b04e72263_0.webp) --- ## ⚙️ Installation 1. Download the `CarryMe.jar` file 2. Place it inside your server's `plugins` folder 3. Start or restart the server 4. Use `/carry ` to get started --- ## ⚙️ Configuration The `config.yml` file allows you to adjust plugin behavior and translate every message into your own language. --- ## ✅ Compatibility * Minecraft `1.19` up to `26.1.2` * Paper * Folia * Modern forks --- ## 💬 Support To report bugs, suggest improvements, or get help with the plugin, use the discussion page or join the **[Discord server](https://discord.gg/WHBWBWWYDq)**.
